$comment: AMF↔XENOS product registry reconciliation (D1/B3). Per XENOS response: ProductTarget.key is the join key; each engine holds a synced copy (federate, not migrate). owner_tenant_id is XENOS's to fill — the OWNER tenant (whose CRM the lead lands in), not the prospect. Confirmed matches keyed; drift + mismatches flagged for operator ratification (P4).

sekago.note: slug matches but sector differs: AMF='digital perimeter defense/deception' vs XENOS selector='WiFi DensePose Security'. Same product? Confirm before campaigning.

fluxcore.note: AMF fluxcore='photonic chip design/EDA' vs XENOS Photonflow='Photonic Compute' — likely the same product, different name. Confirm.

_note: XENOS campaigns 9 products; AMF targets 14. Overlap = 7 (5 confirmed + 2 confirm). AMF-only = 6 (no XENOS campaign). XENOS-only = 2 (Mantopus/Vibely, no AMF universe entry). Drift is explicit, not silent (B3).
